summary: Project sandbox for Frontend Engineer — probes practical UI implementation with AI assist enabled.

coding.title: Component State Panel
coding.statement:
## Component State Panel
**Role context**: Mini frontend task for Frontend Engineer.
### What to build
Build a simple chat-style UI that appends user messages to a scrollable panel.
### Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Typing and clicking Send adds a message bubble
- [ ] Empty input does not add messages
- [ ] Layout remains readable on a narrow viewport
### Notes
- You are encouraged to use the AI assistant.

test_cases.label: Messages render
test_cases.expected: User messages appear in the chat panel.

test_cases.label: Empty guard
test_cases.expected: Blank input does not create a message.

test_cases.label: Responsive layout
test_cases.expected: UI stays usable on narrow screens.
